data.body:
## Description

Modify /dso:sprint Phase 5 dispatch logic in plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md to detect documentation update stories and route them to dso:doc-writer instead of the generic implementation agent.

### Implementation
1. In Phase 5 (Sub-Agent Launch), add a doc-story detection check before the normal dispatch flow
2. Detection: story title matches pattern 'Update project docs to reflect' (as generated by /dso:preplanning)
3. When detected: set subagent_type to 'dso:doc-writer' (model: sonnet) instead of the classify-task.py result
4. Pass epic context (story descriptions, success criteria) and git diff scope to the doc-writer agent
5. Write a RED test first: add a test to an appropriate test file that verifies sprint SKILL.md contains doc-writer dispatch logic for doc update stories
6. After implementation, verify test passes

### File Impact
- Source: plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md (modify — Phase 5 section)
- Test: tests/scripts/test-sprint-skill-doc-writer-dispatch.sh (create)

### TDD Test
Write a test that verifies sprint SKILL.md contains the doc-writer dispatch pattern: the skill file should reference 'dso:doc-writer' in the context of documentation story dispatch, and should include the title pattern detection for 'Update project docs to reflect'.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Sprint SKILL.md Phase 5 contains doc-writer dispatch logic
  Verify: grep -q 'dso:doc-writer' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] Title pattern detection for doc update stories is present
  Verify: grep -q 'Update project docs to reflect' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] Test file exists and passes
  Verify: test -f tests/scripts/test-sprint-skill-doc-writer-dispatch.sh
- [ ] .test-index entry added
  Verify: grep -q 'sprint/SKILL.md.*test-sprint-skill-doc-writer-dispatch' .test-index
